messages.content: inform customer delivery address cannot be changed at the time of delivery .

I'm sorry, but delivery addresses cannot be changed once the delivery is in progress. It is crucial to provide us with the correct delivery address at the time of placing your order. We understand that circumstances may change, but once our delivery drivers are en route, they are unable to deviate from their established routes. 

If you need to update your delivery address, it is recommended to contact us as soon as possible. We can check if any modifications can be made before the delivery process starts. It's always best to ensure that our drivers have accurate information to ensure a successful delivery.

If you are unable to be at the initially provided delivery address during the scheduled delivery time, you may consider providing an alternate address in advance or arranging for someone else to receive the delivery on your behalf.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding in this matter.
inform customer item which you are trying to return is non returnable

I'm sorry to inform you that the item you are trying to return is non-returnable. We understand that returning items can be frustrating, but certain products fall under our non-returnable category. 

Non-returnable items typically include perishable goods, personalized or customized items, intimate or sanitary products, and items that are marked as non-returnable at the time of purchase. It is crucial to thoroughly read the product description and return policy before making a purchase to ensure that you are aware of any non-returnable items.

If you have any concerns or further questions regarding the non-returnable status of your item, please feel free to reach out to our customer service team. They will be happy to assist you and provide any additional information you may need.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding in this matter.
inform customer we cannot price match the item due to the competitive market the prices and offers are keeps on changing time to time and can never be guaranteed. You can return it for a refund

I'm sorry, but we are unable to price match the item you purchased. In the competitive market we operate in, prices and offers tend to change frequently. This makes it challenging for us to guarantee price matching on all products.

However, we do offer the option to return the item for a refund if you are unsatisfied with the purchase. Our return policy outlines the requirements and process for returning items. Please review the policy and follow the instructions to initiate a return if you wish to proceed.

We appreciate your understanding of the ever-changing nature of prices and offers in the market. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact our customer service team. They will be more than happy to assist you.
Inform customer if you have visa or master card you can use it on our website for payment

Great news! We accept Visa and Mastercard as forms of payment on our website. If you have either of these credit cards, you can use them to complete your purchase and make secure payments for your orders.

Simply proceed to the checkout page and select the credit card payment option. You will be prompted to enter your card details, including the card number, expiration date, and CVV code. Ensure that you provide accurate information to ensure a smooth transaction.

If you encounter any issues or have any questions during the payment process, our customer service team is available to assist you. Don't hesitate to reach out to them for any support you may need.

We appreciate your interest in our products and look forward to serving you as our valued customer.

inform customer some order can't be shipped to certain address due vehicle cannot go inside the street. however, we have taken your feedback once it will be available we will update it on our website.

We truly apologize for any inconvenience caused, but there are certain circumstances where we are unable to ship orders to specific addresses. This is primarily due to limitations on vehicle access to certain streets or locations.

We understand the importance of providing accurate and updated information on our website, and we appreciate your feedback. Rest assured, we will take your feedback into consideration and work towards updating our website to provide clearer guidelines on delivery limitations.

In the meantime, if you encounter any issues during the checkout process concerning the delivery address, we kindly request you to contact our customer service team. They will assist you in finding a suitable solution, such as suggesting an alternative nearby delivery location or providing more specific instructions to ensure successful delivery.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience this may cause, and we appreciate your understanding and patience as we strive to improve our services. Your feedback is vital in helping us enhance the overall customer experience.
Inform customer if you are delaying we suggest you to contact Tabby directly they will check and provide you a resolution

If you are experiencing delays with your order, we recommend reaching out to Tabby directly for assistance. Tabby is responsible for managing and coordinating the delivery process, and they will be able to provide you with a resolution or update regarding your specific situation.

Please contact Tabby's customer service team and provide them with your order details or any relevant information. They will be able to check on the status of your order and provide you with timely updates or assist you with any concerns or issues you may have.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delay and appreciate your understanding. Your satisfaction is important to us, and we believe that Tabby will be able to address your concerns and provide a suitable resolution.
Inform customer if you are unable to pay the installment at the moment we suggest you to contact Tabby directly they will check and provide you a resolution

If you are currently unable to pay the installment for your purchase, we recommend contacting Tabby directly to discuss your situation and seek a resolution. Tabby is responsible for managing the installment payment process, and their customer service team will be able to assist you.

When you contact Tabby, please provide them with your order details and explain your payment issue. They will review your case and work with you to find a suitable solution, such as adjusting the payment schedule or exploring alternative payment options.

It's essential to communicate with Tabby as soon as possible to avoid any potential complications or penalties regarding missed payments. They are there to help and provide support specific to installment payments, ensuring a smooth and satisfactory experience for you.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your cooperation. Your satisfaction and financial well-being are important to us, and Tabby will assist you in finding a resolution that fits your current circumstances.
ask customer to share the screenshot of the error if you are getting an error while resetting the password of your account

If you are encountering an error while trying to reset your account password, we apologize for the inconvenience caused. To assist you further, we kindly request that you provide us with a screenshot of the error message you are receiving.

Please take a screenshot of the error and attach it to your message or email. This will help our technical support team better understand the issue and provide you with a more accurate and efficient resolution.

Additionally, if there are any specific details or steps you have taken before encountering the error, please include that information as well. The more details you can provide, the better we will be able to identify the problem and assist you accordingly.

Thank you for your cooperation and understanding. We are dedicated to resolving this issue and ensuring a seamless experience for you.
Inform customer we checked the complaint and as per the update please share the images which shows the actual SN on the box so that we look into this further

Thank you for bringing the issue to our attention. We have investigated your complaint and would like to further examine the situation. In order to assist you effectively, we kindly request that you provide us with images that clearly show the actual serial number (SN) on the product box.

Having the accurate serial number will enable us to investigate the matter further and provide you with an appropriate solution. Please ensure that the images are clear and legible, as this will help expedite the resolution process.

Once you have the images ready, you can either attach them to your response or send them to our customer support email address. We will review the images promptly and get back to you with the next steps to address the issue.

Thank you for your cooperation and assistance. We appreciate your patience as we work toward resolving this matter to your satisfaction.
Write an email to customer and ask customer to share the item name that you received becasue you have multiple items in your order

Subject: Request for Clarification: Item Name in Your Recent Order

Dear [Customer's Name],

We hope this email finds you well. We would like to bring to your attention that we have received your order, but we require some additional information in order to process it efficiently. It appears that your order consists of multiple items, and we kindly request your assistance in providing the specific item name/identifier for the item you have received.

To ensure accuracy and to address any potential concerns, we kindly request that you provide us with the name or description of the item you received. This will greatly assist our team in correctly identifying the product and addressing any discrepancies or issues that may have arisen.

Please feel free to share this information by replying to this email or contacting our customer support team directly. If possible, providing any relevant order numbers or additional details would be greatly appreciated.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause, and we greatly appreciate your cooperation and understanding. Our team is committed to ensuring a smooth and satisfactory resolution for you as our valued customer.

If you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Our dedicated customer support team is available to address any concerns you may have.

Once again, thank you for your understanding and assistance in cooperating with us on this matter. We look forward to your prompt response so that we can swiftly address any issues related to your recent order.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
[Contact Information]

Write an apology letter to customer who has not received a refund yet. Inform customer refund was already processed from our end on June 23rd, 2023 and it take 7 busuiness days to reflect the refund in your account please check your bank statement and contact your bank if still have not received it yet

[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
[Date]

[Customer's Name]
[Customer's Address]
[Customer's City, State, ZIP]

Dear [Customer's Name],

Re: Apology for Delayed Refund

I hope this letter finds you well. I am writing to sincerely apologize for the delay in receiving your refund. We understand how important it is for our customers to receive their refunds promptly and we deeply regret any inconvenience this delay may have caused you.

Upon thorough investigation of your case, I would like to inform you that the refund for [Order Number/Transaction ID] was processed from our end on June 23rd, 2023. In most cases, it takes approximately 7 business days for the refund to reflect in the customer's account.

To ensure that your refund has been correctly processed, we kindly request that you review your bank statement for the mentioned transaction date and check if the refund amount has been credited to your account. If you are unable to locate the refund or require any further assistance, we recommend contacting your bank directly. They will be able to provide you with more information or resolve any concerns regarding the refund.

We deeply regret any inconvenience or confusion caused by this delay. Our team is committed to providing the best possible customer experience, and we are actively reviewing our processes to prevent such delays from occurring in the future.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you. Your satisfaction is of utmost importance to us, and we appreciate your patience and understanding in the matter. Should you have any further questions or require any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer service team, who will be more than happy to assist you.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]
inform customer you can select other available payment method at checkout page

Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out to us. We understand that you are facing difficulties with the payment method during the checkout process. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

To provide you with more options, we would like to inform you that there may be other available payment methods for you to choose from at the checkout page. We offer various payment options such as credit/debit cards, PayPal, bank transfers, or mobile payment methods.

Please navigate to the checkout page and carefully review the list of available payment methods. Select the one that is most convenient for you and proceed with your purchase. If you encounter any issues or have any questions regarding the alternative payment methods, our customer support team is available to assist you further.

Again, we apologize for the inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience and understanding. We value your business and are committed to ensuring a smooth and seamless shopping experience for you. If you have any further questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
[Contact Information]
Inform customer we charge customer according to shipment value inform customer you will not be charge for cancelled item

Dear Customer,

Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. We would like to clarify our charging process to provide you with accurate information.

Our charges are based on the total value of the items that are included in the shipment. If any items are canceled before the shipment is processed, you will not be charged for those canceled items. However, if the canceled item was already shipped, you may be responsible for returning the item or following our return process for a refund.

Rest assured, we strive to ensure transparency and fairness in our billing practices. We are committed to providing you with the best customer service possible and addressing any concerns you may have.

If you have any further questions or need clarification regarding your specific situation or billing, please do not hesitate to contact our customer service team. They are available to assist you and provide any necessary information or guidance.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your business and look forward to serving you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
[Contact Information]
Inform customer we charge customer according to shipment value inform customer you will not be charge for cancelled item as you selected cash on delivery.

Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out to us. We appreciate your understanding and are here to provide clarification on our billing process.

As you have selected the cash on delivery option for your order, please be informed that you will only be charged for the items that are included in the finalized shipment. If any items have been canceled prior to the shipment being processed, you will not be charged for those specific canceled items.

We aim to ensure transparency and fairness in our billing practices, and we appreciate your cooperation in this matter. If you have any further questions or concerns regarding your specific order or billing, please don't hesitate to contact our customer service team. They are available to assist you and provide any necessary information or assistance.

We value your business and appreciate your choice to shop with us. Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to serving you with the utmost care and efficiency.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
[Contact Information]
